svg.title: LinguaLearn MVP App Planning Diagram
svg.desc: A layered architecture diagram showing screens, features, data layer, and tech stack for the LinguaLearn MVP app.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should the splash screen show?')
sendPrompt('How should language selection work?')
sendPrompt('What goes on the home screen?')
sendPrompt('What settings should the app have?')
sendPrompt('How should the lessons feature be structured?')
sendPrompt('How should phrase cards work?')
sendPrompt('How does the translation exercise work?')
sendPrompt('How should Real Situation Mode work?')
sendPrompt('What scenarios should be included in the MVP?')
sendPrompt('What is a sample response in a scenario?')
sendPrompt('How should saved phrases work?')
sendPrompt('What simple progress tracking should the MVP show?')
sendPrompt('Give me example phrases for a Greetings lesson')
sendPrompt('What common phrases should be taught?')
sendPrompt('Give me phrases for asking for help in a foreign country')
sendPrompt('Give me food and ordering vocabulary')
sendPrompt('What phrases help when talking to locals?')
sendPrompt('What phrases help when ordering food abroad?')
sendPrompt('What phrases help when asking for help abroad?')
sendPrompt('What fields should the Lesson data model have?')
sendPrompt('What fields should the Phrase data model have?')
sendPrompt('What fields should the Scenario data model have?')
sendPrompt('How should lessons be stored offline?')
sendPrompt('How should scenarios be stored offline?')
sendPrompt('How should saved phrases be persisted locally?')
sendPrompt('How should progress be tracked locally?')
sendPrompt('Why use React Native for this app?')
sendPrompt('What navigation library should I use?')
sendPrompt('What should I use for local state management?')
sendPrompt('What should I use to persist data offline?')
sendPrompt('What should I build in Phase 1 of my app?')
sendPrompt('What should I build in Phase 2 of my app?')
sendPrompt('What should I build in Phase 3 of my app?')
sendPrompt('What should I build in Phase 4 of my app?')
